text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri! O-gu-ri! C'mon, wake up already!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Don't ya "What is it?" me! You're the one who
begged me to bring ya to the cafeteria for lunch!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was up all night trying to figure something out...
Before I knew it, the sun was up.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And to make matters worse, I couldn't solve my
problem... Can either of you help me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like ya were really racking your brains last
night. Go on then, hit us with it!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday, I ate a rice ball while I was running on
the track...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if I ate while training, it would
make me stronger.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But it didn't make much of a difference. Should I
be eating more? Or do I need to swap out the rice
ball for some bread?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pretty sure that's not the issue here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon after, a half-asleep Oguri Cap devours
lunch beside an astonished Tamamo Cross.
